result.summary: Found a few visible issues: a sticky overlay is covering important legal text, the scroll prompt contains a typo, and the fine print is very hard to read.

issues.description: A large "SCROL DOWN" overlay is floating over the bottom of the page and obscuring part of the disclaimer/legal copy.
issues.suggestion: Move the overlay out of the content area, reduce its size, or hide it after a short delay so it doesn't block important text.

issues.description: The overlay text says "SCROL DOWN" instead of "SCROLL DOWN".
issues.suggestion: Fix the spelling in the prompt copy.

issues.description: The legal fine print at the bottom is extremely small and low-contrast, making it difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size and contrast, or provide the terms in a clearer expandable section.
